section.heading: Report of completion of acquisition of land and work of commission; superintendent of park

content.p: Upon completion of the acquisition of the land and the work of the commission, the Secretary of the Interior shall render a report thereon to Congress, and thereafter the park shall be placed in charge of a superintendent at a salary to be fixed by the Secretary of the Interior and paid out of the appropriation available for the maintenance of the park.

note.heading: Transfer of Functions
note.p: Transfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under section 425 of this title.
